channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA Cup semifinal matchups in Las Vegas: Thunder-Rockets, Bucks-Hawks
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Winning the NBA Cup won't bring a championship parade to Oklahoma City or Houston or Atlanta or Milwaukee. There's a trophy. There's some cash. There are bragging rights. And that's about it. The way the final four teams in the tournament see things, that's enough.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs acquire All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs acquired All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros on Friday, paying a big price for one of baseball's best hitters.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NJ Catholic high school makes history with fourth state football title
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) — It is that time of the week, New York’s very own, when PIX11’s Perry Sook features one of the best and brightest local student-athletes. Bergen Catholic has completed a historic four-peat in high school football.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Taylor Swift will only get $10 birthday present from Travis Kelce's dad
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce's father, Ed Kelce, said that he plans to only spend $10 on a gift for Taylor Swift's 35th birthday this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA owner questions why Caitlin Clark was named Time Athlete of the Year, suggests it will cause racism
item.description: Washington Mystics owner Sheila Johnson said that Time Magazine should have put the whole WNBA on its cover instead of just Caitlin Clark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers after his refusal to enter a game, Kyle Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco coach Kyle Shanahan said linebacker De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers moving forward after he refused to enter a game after losing his starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jets legend Nick Mangold criticizes government officials for lack of answers in NJ drone sightings
item.description: New York Jets legend Nick Mangold expressed his frustrations with the lack of answers from government officials regarding the drone sightings over New Jersey on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn eager for her return to World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland at age 40
item.description: Lindsey Vonn will return to World Cup ski racing next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland, as she continues her comeback at age 40.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Olympic athlete amateur world champion joins Jake Paul's boxing promotion
item.description: Jake Paul's Most Valuable Promotions announced it has added Olympian and amateur world champion Tammara "Tamm" Thibeault to its roster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Rams get 4 field goals to beat the 49ers 12-6 in a sloppy game
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Four nights after winning the highest-scoring game of the NFL season, the Los Angeles Rams won the only game this year that didn't have a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers' playoff hopes dealt critical blow with loss to Rams
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers' chances of making the playoffs are in serious peril after they lost 12-6 to the Los Angeles Rams on Thursday night. The 49ers (6-8) now sit 2.5 games behind the NFC West-leading Seattle Seahawks (8-5). The Rams improved to 8-6 with their win.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Indian teen Gukesh Dommaraju becomes the youngest chess world champion after beating Chinese rival
item.description: NEW DELHI (AP) — Indian teenager Gukesh Dommaraju became the youngest chess world champion Thursday after beating the defending champion Ding Liren of China in the final match of their series in Singapore.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Basketball: Torrey Pines 72, Bishop's 44
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Torrey Pines boys basketball played very well on Tuesday night on the road at Bishop's. They beat Bishop's 72-44.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: OF Mike Tauchman joins the Chicago White Sox with $1.95 million, 1-year contract
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike Tauchman is switching sides in Chicago. Chicago announced a $1.95 million, one-year contract for the outfielder on Wednesday. Tauchman, 34, grew up in Palatine, Illinois, about 35 miles northwest of Chicago, and played college ball for Bradley in Peoria, Illinois.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Top-rated recruit AJ Dybantsa chooses BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The definitive #1 rated basketball recruit in the entire country is coming to BYU. AJ Dybantsa, a 6-foot-9 forward, announced on ESPN Tuesday that he is committing to play basketball for the Cougars starting in the 2025-26 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
